title: astragalus miguelensis
intro: Astragalus miguelensis, also known as the Santa Cruz milkvetch, is a perennial herb that belongs to the legume family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus miguelensis are said to include enhanced immune function, improved cardiovascular health, and reduced stress and anxiety. Astragalus miguelensis is often prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed as a dietary supplement to reap its potential health benefits.
